daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving balanced magic. The cosmos wants you leaning into your natural charm today—people are genuinely drawn to your energy. Trust what feels right.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a moment of real connection brewing. Be honest about what you actually want instead of playing it safe. Vulnerability hits different rn.
daily.career: Your creative ideas have legs today. This is a great time to speak up in meetings or pitch that thing you've been sitting on. Your perspective matters more than you think.
daily.health: Your body's asking for balance—maybe that's moving in a way that feels good, eating something nourishing, or just actually resting without guilt. Listen to what you need.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about reclaiming your peace, Libra. Venus is whispering that it's time to stop people-pleasing and start honoring what actually feels good to you. Trust the shift.
weekly.love: Someone's been waiting for you to make a move, but honestly? The real love story this week is between you and your own boundaries. Setting them isn't cold, it's magnetic.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. Don't dim them down in meetings—the universe is backing your vision hard. Speak up with conviction and watch who actually listens.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for slower mornings and deeper breaths. This week is less about grinding and more about tuning in. What does your nervous system actually need right now?
